title: Metals: A Progression Overhaul
description: A simple, vanilla friendly progression overhaul.
body:
# Metals
**Warning this makes minecraft significanly harder**

This is a decent size progression overhaul. It is designed to increase the time it takes to get max gear from 2 hours to about 7-10 hours but with becoming to grindy.


It does this by changing
- Mob and Player, health and damage.
- Crafting Costs, reqiring different roods for tools.
- Block Drops, adding a chance for copper to drop from diorite, granite and andesite.


This should be compatable with most mods and datapacks that don't overide tool and armor stats and recipes.
